page: Microsoft Azure M192ids_v2 is an isolated virtual machine instance belonging to the MIDSMediumMemoryv2 family. Powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server features an x86_64 architecture with 192 dedicated vCPUs on Intel processors. It is equipped with 2048.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 10.67 GB per vCPU.

The instance includes 4194 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk configurations. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses, and there are no onboard GPU accelerators.

Positioned in a high-density hardware class, the M192ids_v2 offers isolated compute resources, which minimizes multi-tenant interference but carries a higher resource footprint. The lack of integrated GPUs limits its utility for hardware-accelerated machine learning workloads, while the absence of complimentary public IPv4 addresses requires external networking configuration for public access.

This configuration is designed for large-scale, memory-intensive workloads. Suitable use cases include large relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data warehousing tasks that require substantial memory capacity alongside massive parallel processing power.
description: Microsoft Azure M192ids_v2 is an isolated virtual machine from the MIDSMediumMemoryv2 family, designed for high-capacity enterprise workloads. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 instance features 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 2048.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource-dense 10.67 GB of memory per core. Storage capabilities include 4194 GB of local disk space alongside Premium Storage compatibility. The instance lacks onboard GPUs and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given its isolated hardware profile and high memory-to-CPU ratio, the M192ids_v2 is engineered for demanding, memory-intensive applications such as large-scale relational databases, in-memory data analytics, and enterprise resource planning systems.
